message:
feat(runtime): integrate fr-persist AOF capture into command dispatch pipeline

Wire the fr-persist crate into fr-runtime so that every successfully
dispatched mutating command is captured as an AofRecord. This is the
runtime-side integration for append-only file persistence (FR-P2C-005).

Concrete changes:

- Add fr-persist as a dependency of fr-runtime (Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock).
- Import AofRecord and encode_aof_stream from fr-persist in lib.rs.
- Extend the Runtime struct with a new `aof_records: Vec<AofRecord>` field,
  initialized empty in the constructor.
- After a successful `dispatch_argv` in `execute_frame`, call the new
  private method `capture_aof_record` to push the command's argv into the
  in-memory AOF log. Failed/unknown commands are intentionally excluded so
  only state-mutating successes are persisted.
- Expose two public accessors:
    - `aof_records() -> &[AofRecord]` for inspecting the captured log.
    - `encoded_aof_stream() -> Vec<u8>` for serializing the full AOF log
      via fr-persist's wire format encoder.
- Add two unit tests:
    - fr_p2c_005_u001: verifies that SET and DEL are captured while an
      unknown command (NOPE) is not, asserting correct argv contents.
    - fr_p2c_005_u002: round-trips the encoded AOF stream through
      decode_aof_stream and asserts lossless fidelity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
